---
title: "OC17_refinedMAGs_abundance_heatmap_06152026"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-29"
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
library(forcats)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r}
rootdir = "/scratch/users/rsalcedo/OC17wc_deepauto/genome_based/"
```

```{r}
genome_info = read.csv(paste0(rootdir, "/refined_analysis/refined_tables/refined_tableS6_06152026.csv"))
coverM = read.csv(paste0(rootdir, "/refined_analysis/merged_coverM/refined_coverM_all_06152026.csv"))
df = filter(genome_info, catabolism_found == "TRUE")
df$X = NULL
```

```{r}
#add in correct coverM information
metadata_cols <- c(
  "genome",
  "site_generated",
  "depth_generated",
  "classification",
  "completeness",
  "contamination",
  "pathway",
  "previously_reported",
  "catabolism_found",
  "label"
)

abund = select(df, c(metadata_cols))

coverM$Sample = paste(coverM$site, coverM$depth, sep = "_")
coverm_QC = filter(coverM, covered_fraction >= 0.50)
sample_cov = coverm_QC %>% 
  group_by(Sample) %>% 
  summarise(Mean = sum(Mean))

coverm_QC = left_join(coverm_QC, sample_cov, "Sample")
coverm_QC <- coverm_QC %>% 
  rename_with(~ "sample_cov", starts_with("Mean.y"))
coverm_QC <- coverm_QC %>% 
  rename_with(~ "genome_cov", starts_with("Mean.x"))
coverm_QC$relative = coverm_QC$genome_cov/coverm_QC$sample_cov

coverm_QC_mini = select(coverm_QC, c("genome", "Sample", "relative"))

length(unique(coverm_QC_mini$genome))

#match genome and site/depth and add coverM data
abund_df = merge(coverm_QC_mini, abund, by = "genome", all.y = TRUE)

length(unique(abund_df$genome))
```

```{r}
abund_long <- abund_df %>%
  mutate(
    Sample = str_trim(as.character(Sample)),
    
    # extract depth
    parsed_depth = as.numeric(str_extract(Sample, "\\d+$")),
    
    # extract site
    parsed_site = str_extract(Sample, "^[^_]+")
  )

#arrange depths
sample_order <- abund_long %>%
  arrange(parsed_depth, parsed_site) %>%
  pull(Sample) %>%
  unique()

#arrange samples
abund_long <- abund_long %>%
  mutate(
    sample = factor(Sample, levels = sample_order)
  )
```



```{r}
# Order genomes by taxonomy then pathway
genome_order <- abund_long %>%
  distinct(genome, label, pathway) %>%
  arrange(label, pathway, genome) %>%
  pull(genome)

abund_long <- abund_long %>%
  mutate(
    genome = factor(genome, levels = genome_order)
  )

```

```{r}
#plot
p_heatmap = ggplot(
  abund_long,
  aes(
    x = genome,
    y = sample,
    fill = relative
  )
) +
  geom_tile() +
  
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +
  
  facet_grid(
    ~ label,
    scales = "free_x",
    space = "free_x"
  ) +
  
scale_fill_gradientn(
  colours = c(
    "gray95",
    "grey85",
    "grey65",
    "grey40",
    "grey30"
  ),
  na.value = "white"
) +
  
  theme_bw() +
  
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 90,
      hjust = 1,
      vjust = 0.5,
      size = 6
    ),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.1, "cm"),
    strip.text.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "MAG",
    y = "Sample (Depth - Site)",
    fill = "Relative Abundance (%)"
  )

p_heatmap
```
build the pathway annotation bar
```{r}
pathway_df <- abund_long %>%
  distinct(genome, pathway, label)

p_pathway <- ggplot(
  pathway_df,
  aes(
    x = genome,
    y = 1,
    fill = pathway
  )
) +
  geom_tile() +
  facet_grid(
    ~ label,
    scales = "free_x",
    space = "free_x"
  ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "3HP bi-cycle"      = "#CC79A7",
      "3HP/4HB"           = "#E69F00",
      "CBB"               = "#56B4E9",
      "DC/4HB"            = "#660033",
      "3HP bicycle, CBB" = "#A1B5A3"
    )
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
      strip.text.x = element_text(
    angle = 90,
    hjust = 0.5,
    vjust = 0.5
  )
  )
p_pathway

```
combine plots
```{r}
plot = p_pathway / p_heatmap +
  plot_layout(
    heights = c(0.05, 1)
  )

plot
```
save
```{r}
ggsave(file = paste0(rootdir, "/refined_analysis/refined_figures/06152026/06152026_heatmap.pdf"), plot = plot, units = "in", height = 11, width = 20, dpi = 72)
```
